query: Could you help design a travel plan for two people leaving from Houston to Pensacola for 3 days, from March 6th to March 8th, 2022? Our budget is set at $1,400 for this trip and we require our accommodations to be visitor-friendly. We would like to have options to dine at Indian, American, Chinese, and Italian restaurants. We also prefer not to self-drive during the trip.

plan.transportation: Flight F3994851 from Houston to Pensacola
plan.attraction: Pensacola Lighthouse & Maritime Museum; Historic Pensacola Village; Palafox Street Downtown Pensacola;
plan.accommodation: Amazing apartment near museum, gardens & park!, Pensacola

plan.attraction: Plaza De Luna Memorial Monument; Pensacola Museum of Art; The Graffiti Bridge;
plan.accommodation: Amazing apartment near museum, gardens & park!, Pensacola

plan.transportation: Flight F3890675 from Pensacola to Houston
